text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on? I can feel power welling up
within me?! My body's heating up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
O Three Goddesses. I know not whether you are
the ones responsible for this boost...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I shall not let this support go to waste. I will
keep on running—with all this strength!
